name: Transmurdera
description:
Like most Hyperion SMGs, the Transmurdera starts inaccurate but stabilises the longer you hold the trigger. The on-card Accuracy reflects its best-case value after sustained fire.

It uses a Hyperion barrel, trading magazine size for a large accuracy boost. Because the gun and barrel match manufacturers, the usual Hyperion-barrel damage penalty is cancelled out. Overall it suits continuous firing, offering strong SMG damage and tight grouping, though smaller mags mean more reload breaks.
notes:
In The Pre-Sequel it commonly appears with the newer Hyperion materials and prefixes used in Borderlands 2. A related variant, the Pro-Target, is produced by the older Hyperion.

It only spawns at green rarity or higher. The Transmurdera is world drop loot from any appropriate source.
